name: mariadb
note: Retired active runtime component. v0.5.2 stores admin/control-plane state in SQLite through packages/db and apps/api. Maintainers migrating a v0.5.1 deployment must export old data into explicit legacy_* staging tables before running `ct admin migrate`; this manifest remains only to document the retirement and to prevent a MariaDB service from reappearing in docker-compose.yml.
